name: Feishu
description: Feishu connector for bots, chats, and workflow notifications on Lark/Feishu.

FEISHU_APP_ID.label: App Id
FEISHU_APP_ID.help: Feishu/Lark application ID (cli_xxx format) for bot authentication.

FEISHU_DOMAIN.label: Domain
FEISHU_DOMAIN.help: Domain to use: 'feishu' for China or 'lark' for global.

FEISHU_APP_SECRET.label: App Secret
FEISHU_APP_SECRET.help: Feishu/Lark application secret for bot authentication.

FEISHU_TEST_CHAT_ID.label: Test Chat Id
FEISHU_TEST_CHAT_ID.help: Chat ID used by the test suite for validation.

FEISHU_ALLOWED_CHATS.label: Allowed Chats
FEISHU_ALLOWED_CHATS.help: JSON-encoded array of chat IDs authorized to interact with the bot.
